title: Obama Power
description: I made this mod for my brother and decided to release it to the world. Adds Obamaite, a rare, mysterious, and very powerful gem.
body:
# Obama Power
I made this mod for my brother and decided to release it to the world. No, I don't know why.

Obama Power adds Obamaite, a rare, mysterious, and powerful gem, along with tools and armor. Obamaite tools have 10x the power of iron tools (because MCreator measures set power relative to iron). I don't know what that translates to for netherite.

If you put on a full set of Obama Armor, you will become the ultimate life form. (Note: At this time, the Obama full set bonus is EXTREMELY bugged. Use with caution.)

Made with MCreator, because I have no idea how the Forge API works, plus MCreator is easier.
